_comment: Day 6 X mirror queue entry — documented Canadian surveillance overreach. Anchor on declassified record: Tommy Douglas, Ipperwash, Northern Gateway.
text:
RCMP surveilled Tommy Douglas — the man who built Medicare — for 30+ years.

CSIS told police Indigenous land defenders at Ipperwash were armed in 1995. They were not.

CSIS later spied on Northern Gateway protesters + shared intel with Enbridge. Declassified.
